label: I-405 N · QVDF calibrated (Caltrans PeMS)
source: Caltrans PeMS I-405 N · QVDF-calibrated speed reconstruction + analytical queue Q(t) (polynomial arrival queue, inflow demand/capacity). Public (PeMS).

narration.text: Corridor near free-flow (~95% of the peak reference speed). Detectors nominal; no active TIM.
Speed breaks down at 16:45 — capacity drop / onset of congestion. A recurrent queue forms; the red front propagates upstream (a shockwave moving against traffic).
Speed recovers by 18:45 — queue discharges, shockwave clears. Roadway clearance complete; confirm MOEs (TTI, delay) return to baseline.

qlabel: ■ red tail = QVDF queue Q(t) ∝ (t−t₀)²(t₃−t)² — analytical, calibrated (D/C on hover)
